label: The Sightslit Bunkroom
description: The Sightslit Bunkroom is a narrow sleeping chamber cut into the same basalt-glass mass as The Shearline Arsenal, its ceiling line following the escarpment’s engineered angles. A single slit-window is set with mirror-slag louvers that segment Lacrymara’s copper-white twilight into measured bands, preserving the shop’s navigational alignment even at rest. The walls carry dust-pinned matte panels and fused hooks for gear, while a low bunk is built directly from vitrified stone with a recessed drawer sealed against electrostatic glass grit. The floor’s inlaid seam-line strip provides a fixed orientation line that continues the Concord’s calibrated street geometry indoors.
